options.content:
## Tools & MCP
Tool calls, failure rates, and likely MCP or extension-provided tools.

azureLogAnalytics.query: AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), conversation=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), strcat(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), '_', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'))), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where ('$model' == '$__all' or model in (${model:singlequote})) | where ('$operation' == '$__all' or operation in (${operation:singlequote})) | where ('$agent' == '$__all' or agent in (${agent:singlequote})) | where ('$repo' == '$__all' or repo in (${repo:singlequote})) | where ('$tool' == '$__all' or tool in (${tool:singlequote})) | where operation == 'execute_tool' or isnotempty(tool) | summarize Calls=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), conversation=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), strcat(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), '_', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'))), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where ('$model' == '$__all' or model in (${model:singlequote})) | where ('$operation' == '$__all' or operation in (${operation:singlequote})) | where ('$agent' == '$__all' or agent in (${agent:singlequote})) | where ('$repo' == '$__all' or repo in (${repo:singlequote})) | where ('$tool' == '$__all' or tool in (${tool:singlequote})) | where operation == 'execute_tool' or isnotempty(tool) | summarize Failures=countif(Success == false or isnotempty(error)) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), conversation=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), strcat(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), '_', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'))), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where ('$model' == '$__all' or model in (${model:singlequote})) | where ('$operation' == '$__all' or operation in (${operation:singlequote})) | where ('$agent' == '$__all' or agent in (${agent:singlequote})) | where ('$repo' == '$__all' or repo in (${repo:singlequote})) | where ('$tool' == '$__all' or tool in (${tool:singlequote})) | where operation == 'execute_tool' or isnotempty(tool) | where tool !in ('bash','powershell','list_bash','list_powershell','read_bash','read_powershell','stop_bash','stop_powershell','write_bash','write_powershell','apply_patch','create','edit','view','list_agents','read_agent','task','ask_user','glob','grep','rg','skill','web_fetch') and isnotempty(tool) | summarize Tools=dcount(tool) by bin(TimeGenerated, $__interval) | order by TimeGenerated asc

// MCP and tool usage view for Copilot CLI AgentOps.
// Copilot reports all tool invocations as execute_tool spans. Built-in tools are
// classified from the documented CLI tool list; everything else is treated as
// likely MCP or extension-provided until validated against real field samples.
let lookback = 7d;
let builtin_tools = dynamic([
    "bash", "powershell", "list_bash", "list_powershell", "read_bash", "read_powershell",
    "stop_bash", "stop_powershell", "write_bash", "write_powershell", "apply_patch",
    "create", "edit", "view", "list_agents", "read_agent", "task", "ask_user",
    "glob", "grep", "rg", "skill", "web_fetch"
]);
let session_id = (props:dynamic, timestamp:datetime) {
    case(
        isnotempty(tostring(props["gen_ai.conversation.id"])),
        tostring(props["gen_ai.conversation.id"]),
        isnotempty(tostring(props["github.copilot.interaction_id"])),
        tostring(props["github.copilot.interaction_id"]),
        strcat(
            tostring(props["gen_ai.agent.id"]),
            "_",
            tostring(props["github.copilot.turn_count"]),
            "_",
            format_datetime(bin(timestamp, 1h), "yyyyMMdd_HHmm")
        )
    )
};
AppDependencies
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where Properties has "github.copilot" and Properties has "github-copilot-cli"
| extend
    session = session_id(Properties, TimeGenerated),
    operation = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.operation.name"]),
    tool = tostring(Properties["gen_ai.tool.name"]),
    model = coalesce(tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.model"]), tostring(Properties["gen_ai.request.model"])),
    mode = tostring(Properties["agentops.cli.mode"]),
    repo = tostring(Properties["agentops.repo.hash"]),
    error = tostring(Properties["error.type"])
| where operation == "execute_tool" or isnotempty(tool)
| extend
    tool_family = case(
        tool in (builtin_tools), "builtin",
        tool has "-", "likely_mcp_or_extension",
        isnotempty(tool), "custom_or_unknown",
        "unknown"
    ),
    success = Success != false and isempty(error)
| summarize
    calls = count(),
    failures = countif(not(success)),
    sessions = dcount(session),
    p50_duration_ms = percentile(DurationMs, 50),
    p95_duration_ms = percentile(DurationMs, 95),
    first_seen = min(TimeGenerated),
    last_seen = max(TimeGenerated),
    models = make_set_if(model, isnotempty(model), 5),
    modes = make_set_if(mode, isnotempty(mode), 5),
    repos = make_set_if(repo, isnotempty(repo), 5),
    errors = make_set_if(error, isnotempty(error), 10)
    by tool_family, tool
| extend failure_pct = round(100.0 * failures / calls, 1)
| order by tool_family asc, failures desc, calls desc

AppDependencies | where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']), conversation=case(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id'])), tostring(Properties['gen_ai.conversation.id']), isnotempty(tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id'])), tostring(Properties['github.copilot.interaction_id']), strcat(tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.id']), '_', tostring(Properties['github.copilot.turn_count']), '_', format_datetime(bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), 'yyyyMMdd_HHmm'))), agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']), model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']), tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']), repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']), error=tostring(Properties['error.type']) | where ('$model' == '$__all' or model in (${model:singlequote})) | where ('$operation' == '$__all' or operation in (${operation:singlequote})) | where ('$agent' == '$__all' or agent in (${agent:singlequote})) | where ('$repo' == '$__all' or repo in (${repo:singlequote})) | where ('$tool' == '$__all' or tool in (${tool:singlequote})) | where operation == 'execute_tool' or isnotempty(tool) | project TimeGenerated, Session=conversation, tool, model, repo, DurationMs, Success, ResultCode, error | order by TimeGenerated desc | take 300

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend model=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.request.model']) | where isnotempty(model) | distinct model | order by model asc

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend operation=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.operation.name']) | where isnotempty(operation) | distinct operation | order by operation asc

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend agent=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.agent.name']) | where isnotempty(agent) | distinct agent | order by agent asc

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend repo=tostring(Properties['agentops.repo.hash']) | where isnotempty(repo) | distinct repo | order by repo asc

AppDependencies | where TimeGenerated > ago(14d) | where Properties has 'github.copilot' and Properties has 'github-copilot-cli' | extend tool=tostring(Properties['gen_ai.tool.name']) | where isnotempty(tool) | distinct tool | order by tool asc
